incidents.title: Developing: Moshi building collapse: PCMC suspends two officials; departmental probes ordered
incidents.summary: The civic body had issued show-cause notices to the two officials following the July 8 incident, in which a massive garbage mound collapsed onto the administrative building of the waste-to-energy plant at the Moshi garbage depot.
incidents.impact: The area may remain hazardous while rescue, recovery or safety checks continue.
incidents.recommendedAction: Avoid the immediate area and follow police, fire-service or civic instructions.

activeRiskEvents.impact: The area may remain hazardous while rescue, recovery or safety checks continue.

expiredEvents.title: Developing: Passport office gets third hoax bomb threat in five months
expiredEvents.summary: Passport office gets third hoax bomb threat in five months
expiredEvents.impact: There may be an immediate risk to life and a wider safety perimeter may be required.
expiredEvents.recommendedAction: Move away from the area and follow emergency-service instructions immediately.
